title: Trident Crafting Recipe
description: This mod adds a recipe for tridents
body:
**Trident Crafting Recipe**
=======================================

This mod adds a crafting recipe for tridents, but not that overpowered.

Items needed:
- 3 prismarine shards
- 1 heart of the sea
- 1 stick
Crafting Recipe:

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf8758238358224ab56a07efadd8403c8e888a3d.png)

_**Note**_:

- The items in the recipe are the old textures
